targets.query:
from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["${column}"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "distribution")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["${column}"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "breakdown")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "upload_meta")
  |> group()
  |> count()
  |> yield(name: "uploads")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "excel_data" and r._field == "_record_count")
  |> group(columns: ["upload_id", "filename"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> yield(name: "per_upload")

from(bucket: "excel")
  |> range(start: -100y)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "upload_meta")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "upload_id", "filename", "record_count"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 50)
  |> yield(name: "uploads")
